name: phpdot/mail
description: Coroutine-safe transactional email for the PHPdot ecosystem: a fluent, immutable message builder over any symfony/mailer transport.

suggest.phpdot/container: Auto-wires the mailer via #[Singleton], #[Binds] and #[Config] attributes (inert at runtime; standalone consumers don't need it installed).
suggest.phpdot/config: Populates MailConfig from config/mail.php when used with phpdot/package.
suggest.phpdot/package: Auto-discovers the mailer's services via attribute scanning.
